methods.description: This method describes the process of extracting, separating, and quantifying n-alkanes from sediment samples to analyze their homolog distributions and prepare them for 14C dating.

steps.description: Samples were extracted with accelerated solvent extraction as described by Bliedtner et al. (2018a).
steps.searchable_summary: perform accelerated solvent extraction on samples

steps.description: Samples were re-extracted using an ultrasonic treatment according to Bliedtner et al. (2018b).
steps.searchable_summary: apply ultrasonic treatment for re-extraction of samples

steps.description: Total lipid extracts were separated over aminopropyl pipette columns into apolar, more polar, and acid fractions.
steps.searchable_summary: separate lipid extracts into fractions using aminopropyl columns

steps.description: n-Alkanes were eluted with ∼4 mL hexane and purified over coupled silver-nitrate (AgNO3−) zeolite pipette columns.
steps.searchable_summary: elute and purify n-alkanes using hexane and AgNO3− zeolite columns

steps.description: n-Alkanes were identified and quantified using a gas chromatograph (Agilent 7890 with an Agilent HP5MS column) equipped with a flame ionization detector (GC-FID).
steps.searchable_summary: identify and quantify n-alkanes using GC-FID

methods.description: This method outlines the procedure for performing 14C dating on n-alkane fractions, including preheating, transferring to tin capsules, and analyzing with AMS.

steps.description: Purified nonheated and preheated n-alkane fractions were transferred with dichloromethane into tin capsules.
steps.searchable_summary: transfer n-alkane fractions into tin capsules using dichloromethane

steps.description: 14C dating was performed on the Mini Carbon Dating System (MICADAS) AMS coupled online to an elemental analyzer.
F14C results were corrected for cross and constant contamination using a contamination drift model.
All 14C ages were calibrated to cal yr BP (95.4% range) with the IntCal13 calibration curve using OxCal.
steps.searchable_summary: calibrate 14C ages using IntCal13 and OxCal
